results.text: {"decision":"The test should pass if evidence search gives an explicit code reference priority over lexical matching.","rationale":"The named test establishes ordering, not a broad search redesign: resolve and forward the code reference first, then use lexical search only when no usable code-reference result exists.","next_step":"Confirm the evidence-search facade invokes its code-reference path before its lexical fallback and add no fallback call when a code reference is present."}
